principalInvestigator.name: Kangjin Kim, DPH
principalInvestigator.title: Assistant Professor
principalInvestigator.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
principalInvestigator.bio: Kangjin Kim’s research focuses on statistical and computational methods for high-dimensional biomedical data, with applications to statistical genetics, multi-omics, survival and prediction modeling, respiratory disease, and precision medicine.

background.label: Education
background.value: BS in Statistics; MPH/DPH in Biostatistics

background.label: Postdoctoral Research
background.value: Harvard Medical School and Brigham and Women’s Hospital

graduateStudents.name: Jihyeon Lee
graduateStudents.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
graduateStudents.bio: Jihyeon is a master's student in the Department of Applied Statistics at Gachon University. Her research focuses on aging, cognitive decline, and inflammation based on biostatistics and data analysis, with the goal of contributing to data-driven decision-making in healthcare.

graduateStudents.name: Junjae Won
graduateStudents.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
graduateStudents.bio: Junjae is interested in developing statistical and machine learning approaches for biomedical and environmental health data.

graduateStudents.name: Eunjae Han
graduateStudents.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
graduateStudents.bio: Eunjae is interested in using bioinformatics and statistical methods to study omics data and disease-related biomarkers.

undergraduateResearchers.name: Seoyoung Bae
undergraduateResearchers.department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
undergraduateResearchers.bio: Seoyoung is interested in learning statistical and computational methods for analyzing complex biomedical data.
